en_body:
O Love! Like the beating wings of two doves
O Love! Like a butterfly enamored, seeking nectar
O Love! Like the firefly hurling itself into Light:

 Stop here one moment inside my breast
 burning alive
 blood pumping onward
 four chambers
 faithful:

 Here,
 my heart..!!
note: The four chambers of the physical heart become a faithful sanctuary where Love is asked to rest.
